title: ADK Replay InputFile
description: Schema for the --replay JSON file consumed by `adk run --replay`. Defined by google.adk.cli.cli.InputFile. Only two top-level fields exist; all agent behavior is driven through state keys or query prompts.

state.description: Initial session state passed to session_service.create_session(). Keys are arbitrary strings; values are any JSON-serializable type. A `_time` field is auto-injected at runtime with the current ISO timestamp.

additionalProperties.description: Arbitrary session state value (string, number, boolean, object, array, or null).

queries.description: User prompts submitted sequentially. Each query creates a new invocation against the same session.
